markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Uranium
markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump says Uranium as part of next White House (YouTube) live announcement by Donald Trump, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Video of the next White House (YouTube) live announcement by Donald Trump will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, transcripts of the next White House (YouTube) live announcement by Donald Trump will be used according to the news publications listed in the contract. The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. Plural nouns used as or within a proper nouns (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included. Please see full rules for more details. For the purposes of this market, “next White House announcement by Donald Trump” refers to the first qualifying livestream on the White House main YouTube channel (@WhiteHouse) after March 2nd, 2026 at 3:30 PM ET. The event will resolve based on Donald Trump speaking in an official capacity; if Donald Trump is present during a livestream, but does not speak in an official capacity, the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic). If Donald Trump is not present during a livestream posted by the White House the market will not qualify. Additional source agency streams can be used in the event of technical outages or if the White House ends the stream prior to the conclusion of the event. For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event. Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the livestream will not count. Press gaggles will not qualify.
markets.title: What will Donald Trump say during next White House (YouTube) live announcement by Donald Trump?
markets.yes_sub_title: Uranium
